title: Project 3
subtitle: Example for linktype "pdf"
longDescription:
How the project started: what was it about, for whom, and in which context? Two or three sentences are enough here – the detail follows in the sections below.
HTML is allowed, so you can add line breaks and links.
shortDescription: Very short description, capturing the essence of the project in a few words.

sections.title: Challenge
sections.body: Which problem needed solving, and why was it hard? Describe the starting point, the audience and the constraints you worked under.

sections.title: Approach
sections.body: How did you go about it? Which decisions did you make and why? This is where your own contribution belongs – methods, iterations, and the things you discarded.

sections.title: Outcome
sections.body: What came out of it, and what did it achieve? Measurable results are strong, but qualitative impact counts just as much.

images.alt: Caption: shown below the image and in the lightbox.
Describe what can be seen – this doubles as the accessibility text.
Add as many images as you like, they render as a gallery.
